title: Column Names and Zapier Fields

posts.author: celloshred (Michael Wolff)
posts.cookedHtml:
As column names (for automation purposes) are assigned and tedious to display in Monday and also tedious to cross reference as Fields in Zapier…

Is there a better way to organize this or a work around? When testing new Zaps/Automations it’s a lot of back and forth and sending dummy data in fields just to easily identify. And of course moving a test automation into a new board for active production, the Zap has to be completely re-coded.
